title: mandevilla leptophylla
intro: Mandevilla leptophylla, also known as the 'Wild Mandevilla' or 'Rango', is a flowering vine native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright green, hairy leaves and showy white flowers. Traditionally, Mandevilla leptophylla has been used in folk medicine, where it's valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which help in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health. Mandevilla leptophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
